scenes.description: 一个人在明亮的室内专注使用笔记本电脑,环境安静整洁,自然光从窗户照入,营造出温馨的工作氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: A person in a cozy indoor study room is focused on working at a wooden desk with a laptop. The character wears dark clothing and types steadily, occasionally glancing at the screen. Soft natural light streams through a window, illuminating the warm-toned space with light walls and wooden furniture. The atmosphere is calm and productive. Camera holds a medium static shot with slight depth of field. 4K resolution, daylight-balanced color grading, realistic lighting, subtle ambient sound design.

style_elements.characters: Adult individual in dark attire, seated and focused, professional yet relaxed demeanor
style_elements.environment: Indoor home office with wooden desk, ergonomic chair, minimal decor, bright and clean
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, natural lighting with soft shadows, realistic textures, modern and tidy aesthetic
style_elements.camera_movement: Static medium shot with slight focus pull on hands and screen

scenes.description: 卡通角色驾驶拖拉机穿越野外,警告前方有障碍,进入泥潭后车轮打滑无法前进,气氛转为紧张与焦急。
scenes.video_prompt: Animated countryside scene: A cartoon bear drives a small red tractor down a bumpy forest path, waving cheerfully. The sky is bright blue with fluffy clouds. Suddenly, he hits a deep muddy pit—wheels spin helplessly, splashing thick brown sludge. Voiceover expresses panic: 'Why can't I move?' Close-up on frustrated face, mud-splattered fur. Camera shakes slightly to emphasize struggle. Vibrant colors, exaggerated expressions, soft cel-shading style. Wide-to-close dynamic camera movement. 16:9 aspect ratio, smooth animation at 24fps, playful but tense mood.

style_elements.characters: Anthropomorphic animals: bear driver, expressive facial features, wearing overalls
style_elements.environment: Outdoor forest trail with mud puddles, tall grass, distant trees, sunny weather
style_elements.visual_style: Cartoon-style animation with bold outlines, saturated colors, whimsical design
style_elements.camera_movement: Dynamic transitions from wide to close-up, slight shake during struggle

scenes.description: 小兔子下车尝试帮忙推车但失败,三人被困泥中,拖拉机完全卡住,角色们表现出沮丧和无奈。
scenes.video_prompt: The rabbit hops out of the tractor, trying to push it from behind, slipping in the mud. 'I'm here!' he calls, but the wheels keep spinning. Cut to sheep passenger shaking head: 'We're stuck.' All three characters look around helplessly. Mud covers their legs and parts of the vehicle. Background shows isolated trail, no other life. Emotions shift to disappointment and mild despair. Medium group shot with emotional close-ups. Bright palette contrasts with gloomy situation. Gentle wind sounds and squelching mud effects. Animated storytelling style with expressive timing.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit and sheep join bear; all anthropomorphic, expressive eyes, muddy fur
style_elements.environment: Remote dirt path surrounded by grassy hills, large mud坑 in center
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical 2D animation with soft shading, lively character animation
style_elements.camera_movement: Cut between medium action shots and emotional close-ups

scenes.description: 角色讨论解决方案,提议清理泥浆,但觉得太累,随后灵机一动想到新办法,开始寻找工具。
scenes.video_prompt: Characters huddle together brainstorming: 'Let’s dig the mud away!' says the bear, panting. Rabbit replies, 'But it’ll be so tiring…' Pause. Then sudden inspiration lights up his eyes: 'Wait—I’ve got an idea!' He rushes off-screen searching. Cut to frantic digging through toolboxes, lifting logs. 'Where is it? Come on!' Tension builds with comedic urgency. Background music shifts to hopeful melody. Visuals remain colorful and bouncy despite fatigue theme. Over-the-shoulder shots follow search efforts. Lively pacing maintains engagement.

style_elements.characters: Bear leads idea; rabbit shows determination; sheep observes calmly
style_elements.environment: Same muddy clearing, now with scattered tools and crates nearby
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive cartoon rendering with motion lines and impact frames
style_elements.camera_movement: Quick cuts and tracking shots following movement, POV glimpses

scenes.description: 找到吸尘器,原来是小胡发明的真空装置,请求小熊协助搬运到现场。
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up on a dusty corner—a cleverly hidden vacuum device covered in cobwebs. 'Found it!' shouts Hu (a clever fox character). He brushes it off proudly. Zoom out to reveal a custom-built machine with hoses and motor. 'This is my new invention!' He calls熊 (bear): 'Can you help me carry it?' Bear nods, grunts as they lift. Two-shot walking toward tractor. Device rattles comically. Warm sunlight highlights metallic parts. Whimsical tech design blends wood and pipes. Slight low-angle shot emphasizes effort. Playful mechanical sound effects enhance humor and ingenuity.

style_elements.characters: Fox (Hu) as inventor, energetic and proud; bear strong and cooperative
style_elements.environment: Woodland edge with storage crates, vines, dappled sunlight
style_elements.visual_style: Fantasy-rustic tech design, cartoon realism, detailed gadget textures
style_elements.camera_movement: Close-ups on device, two-shot tracking walk, slight low angle

scenes.description: 组装吸尘器并连接拖拉机电池供电,准备启动清除泥浆。
scenes.video_prompt: The team gathers around the tractor. Fox connects a thick cable from the vacuum to the tractor’s battery: 'Plug it in—power source secured!' Sparks briefly flash (cartoonish). Sheep watches nervously. Rabbit holds hose ready. 'Switch on—now!' Bear flips a large red toggle switch. Machine hums to life with rising pitch. Dust swirls as suction begins. Slow-motion shot of mud lifting into the tube. Bright UI lights glow on device. Camera circles the group in triumph. Sound builds with mechanical whirring and hopeful music swell.

style_elements.characters: Team collaboration: fox directs, bear powers, rabbit assists, sheep observes
style_elements.environment: Muddy site transformed into makeshift workshop with cables and tools
style_elements.visual_style: Dynamic lighting on machine, glowing elements, animated particle effects
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular tracking shot around team, slow-mo for activation

scenes.description: 吸尘器成功吸干泥浆,拖拉机脱困,小熊推动车辆脱险,大家欢呼庆祝。
scenes.video_prompt: Powerful suction clears mud rapidly—tractor tires emerge from muck. 'It’s working!' cheers Rabbit. Bear pushes gently from behind. With a final lurch, the tractor rolls free! Group jumps in joy: high-fives, tail wags. 'We did it!' Camera tilts up to clear sky as sun breaks through clouds. Mud-free ground revealed beneath. Vehicle steams slightly from exertion (comedy effect). Upbeat music swells. Fast cuts of celebration: spinning wheels, happy faces, dust settling. Realistic physics blended with cartoon exaggeration for emotional payoff.

style_elements.characters: All celebrate with exaggerated joy, muddy but triumphant
style_elements.environment: Previously muddy area now cleaned, showing dry earth and grass
style_elements.visual_style: High-energy animation with sparkle effects, dramatic lighting shift
style_elements.camera_movement: Tilt up, fast cuts, dynamic angles during release moment

scenes.description: 继续旅程去送甘草,到达目的地,小羊们饥饿等待,终于收到食物。
scenes.video_prompt: Tractor drives smoothly down path toward a sunny meadow. Cut to hungry lambs bleating: 'When will the hay come?' Stomach growls emphasized. Arrival music cues—'We’re here!' Tractor unloads fresh hay bales. Lambs rush forward, munching happily. Parental sheep sighs in relief. Warm golden hour lighting enhances emotional closure. Close-up on satisfied faces. Gentle breeze rustles grass. Peaceful resolution tone. Wide establishing shot shows harmony between helpers and recipients. Soft orchestral finish.

style_elements.characters: Lambs eager and cute; delivery crew kind and fulfilled
style_elements.environment: Sunny meadow with grazing area, hay barn in distance
style_elements.visual_style: Golden-hour lighting, soft focus edges, heartwarming palette
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide arrival shot, close-ups on eating lambs, slow zoom-out

scenes.description: 庆祝成功完成任务,大家一起跳舞欢庆,画面充满欢乐与团结的氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: Full cast dances in circle around the tractor—bunny hops, bear spins, fox claps rhythmically. 'Let’s dance!' Laughter fills the air. Japanese text appears playfully: '皆んななかな'. Confetti-like leaves fall. Music becomes festive folk beat. Camera rotates overhead in smooth drone-like motion. Characters sing along. Joy radiates through exaggerated motions and smiles. Final frame freezes with hearts above heads. Bright colors pop under midday sun. A perfect ending celebrating friendship and teamwork.

style_elements.characters: All characters dancing with exaggerated, joyful movements
style_elements.environment: Open field near tractor, bright daylight, celebratory vibe
style_elements.visual_style: Festive animation with motion trails, floating text, vibrant hues
